reasoning: The panel_dialog_v01 is immediately locatable against the dark dungeon background — large warm gold/amber border with cream interior creates strong contrast against cool teal-black tiles. Spottable well within 0.5s. Pixel art style (ornate corner face-icons, chunky pixelated border) is consistent with existing game UI (matches amber 攻击 button palette). Both the upper golden section and lower cream section have high tonal contrast with the dungeon floor. No confusion with game entities — clearly reads as a UI overlay panel. Echoes cleanliness is good: warm retro palette, no visual noise. Minor issue: both interior zones are empty (no text content), making it feel placeholder; this does not affect readability but would be a content concern at runtime. Arrow marker position aligns to the right edge of the panel near the 压板 button, but the panel itself is unmistakable. Overall strong integration.
